metadata.description: The friendly name for the workbook that is used in the Gallery or Saved List.  This name must be unique within a resource group.
The gallery that the workbook will been shown under. Supported values include workbook, tsg, etc. Usually, this is 'workbook'
The id of resource instance to which the workbook will be associated
The unique guid for this workbook instance

properties.serializedData:
{"version":"Notebook/1.0","items":[{"type":1,"content":{"json":"


This workbook shows Entra ID ingestion status, failed sign-in candidates by source IP, directory role change activity, and service principal credential change activity. Use it to triage identity-related incidents generated by the Lab 06 scheduled analytics rules.","title":"Lab 06 — Entra ID detection engineering"},"name":"text - 0"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"AuditLogs
| where TimeGenerated >= ago(24h)
| summarize RowCount=count(), LastSeen=max(TimeGenerated)
| extend TableName = "AuditLogs"
| project TableName, RowCount, LastSeen
","size":3,"title":"Entra Ingestion Status","timeContext":{"durationMs":86400000},"queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces"},"name":"query - 4"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"SigninLogs
| where TimeGenerated >= ago(24h)
| where ResultType != 0
| summarize FailureCount=count(), DistinctUsers=dcount(UserPrincipalName), FirstSeen=min(TimeGenerated), LastSeen=max(TimeGenerated) by IPAddress
| order by FailureCount desc
","size":3,"title":"Failed Sign-In Candidates by IP","timeContext":{"durationMs":86400000},"queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces"},"name":"query - 2"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"AuditLogs
| where TimeGenerated >= ago(7d)
| where OperationName in ("Add member to role", "Remove member from role")
| extend InitiatingUserUPN = tostring(InitiatedBy.user.userPrincipalName)
| mv-expand TargetResources
| extend TargetDisplayName = tostring(TargetResources.displayName)
| project TimeGenerated, OperationName, InitiatingUserUPN, TargetDisplayName, CorrelationId
| order by TimeGenerated desc
","size":3,"title":"Directory Role Change Timeline","timeContext":{"durationMs":86400000},"queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces"},"name":"query - 3"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"AuditLogs
| where TimeGenerated >= ago(7d)
| where OperationName in ("Add service principal credentials", "Update service principal")
| extend InitiatingUserUPN = tostring(InitiatedBy.user.userPrincipalName)
| mv-expand TargetResources
| extend TargetDisplayName = tostring(TargetResources.displayName)
| project TimeGenerated, OperationName, InitiatingUserUPN, TargetDisplayName, CorrelationId
| order by TimeGenerated desc
","size":3,"title":"Service Principal Credential Events","timeContext":{"durationMs":86400000},"queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces"},"name":"query - 4"}],"isLocked":false,"fallbackResourceIds":["/subscriptions/d4c995f0-0cba-4d52-8272-4c568d44b677/resourcegroups/rg-dfir-lab06-authoring/providers/microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces/law-dfir-lab06-authoring"],"fromTemplateId":"sentinel-UserWorkbook"}
